steps.title: Substitute x = 43 into the model
steps.content: The colony has 43 worker ants, and $25 \leq 43 \leq 115$, so the equation applies: $$y = 0.68(43) + 3.1$$

steps.title: Eliminate the other choices
steps.content:
• A) 32 — matches 32.34, the predicted value.
  • B) 46 — would require $y \approx 46$, far above 32.34.
  • C) 60 — way too high; you'd get this from $x \approx 83$.
  • D) 163 — this is roughly $(0.68+3.1) \cdot 43$, so it comes from multiplying incorrectly; nowhere near 32.34.
That matches Choice A — 32.
